bi_bullet.name: bi-bullet
bi_bullet.descript: does weaker damages, but it will split in to two after hit an enemy

eletric.name: eletric
eletric.descript: add eletric damage, paralyze the enemy

fireWand.name: fire wand
fireWand.descript: will ignite enemies on its path

poisonExp.name: poison explode
poisonExp.descript: if this bullet kill an enemy, it will cause an poison explosion; will hurt yourself
